channel.title: Ues on Gourmand Syndrome
channel.description: Recent content in Ues on Gourmand Syndrome

item.title: Boqueria
item.description: Summary The brunch feast seems like a good thing. For $40, you get to pick 4 tapas, 2 main entrees (paella counts as 2), a dessert, and unlimited mimosas/sangrias. The spanish omelette (tortilla española) tasted similar to a breakfast quiche. Nothing too memorable about it. The bread with tomato with ham (pan con tomate con jamón) was ok. The albóndigas was nothing special for me. Basically lamb meatballs with marinara.

item.title: Flora Bar
item.description: Seafood centric. Ambience is good, but the food is eh.

item.title: Tal Bagels
item.description: Believe it or not, their pastrami was actually better than Pastrami Queen.

item.title: Pastrami Queen
item.description: Pretty good pastrami. It’s no Katz, and it’s not filling, but it was good. It’s thin sliced meats.

item.title: Grazie
item.description: I only ate here because it was close to the MET. I don’t remember what I had, but I’ve only written that it was good.
